recommendations.title: The Kiss
recommendations.overview: They get ready to kiss, begin to kiss, and kiss in a way that brings down the house every time.

recommendations.title: Die Nibelungen: Siegfried
recommendations.overview: Siegfried, son of King Siegmund of Xanten, travels to Worms, capital of the Burgundian kingdom, to ask King Gunther for the hand of his sister, the beautiful Kriemhild.

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth
recommendations.overview: When teenager Elle's first kiss leads to a forbidden romance with the hottest boy in high school, she risks her relationship with her best friend.

recommendations.title: Black Butler
recommendations.genres: Horror, Fantasy, Action, Adventure, Mystery, Crime, Drama
recommendations.overview: Set in the year 2020, following her supposed death, a young woman returns as the son of her noble family to precede the family's prestigious company, with a demon at her side to avenge her parent's murder.

recommendations.title: Kizumonogatari Part 1: Tekketsu
recommendations.overview: One day, Koyomi Araragi encounters the horrifying vampire, Kiss-shot Acerola-orion Heart-under-blade A.K.A. the "King of Apparitions." He saves the fatally wounded Kiss-shot by offering his blood at the expense of his own life as a human. Now Koyomi

recommendations.title: Don't Knock Twice
recommendations.overview: A mother desperate to reconnect with her troubled daughter becomes embroiled in the urban legend of a demonic witch.

recommendations.title: The Phantom of the Opera
recommendations.overview: A young soprano becomes the obsession of a disfigured and murderous musical genius who lives beneath the Paris Opera House.

recommendations.title: The Thief and the Cobbler
recommendations.overview: Princess Yum Yum falls in love with Tack and saves him from being executed. Later, when the protective orbs of the palace get stolen, Tacka and Yum Yum set out to find them and save the kingdom.

recommendations.title: The Quiet Man
recommendations.overview: An American man returns to the village of his birth in Ireland, where he finds love and conflict.

recommendations.title: Phantom of the Opera
recommendations.overview: Following a tragic accident that leaves him disfigured, crazed composer Erique Claudin transformed into a masked phantom who schemes to make beautiful young soprano Christine Dubois the star of the opera and wreak revenge on those who stole his music
